name: World of Warcraft TCG
notes: The official TCG for Blizzard's World of Warcraft MMO. Notable for its Loot cards, which granted in-game WoW items including the iconic Spectral Tiger mount.

name: Dune CCG
notes: Based on Frank Herbert's Dune novels. Six factions — Atreides, Harkonnen, Corrino, Fremen, Bene Gesserit, and Spacing Guild — compete for control of Arrakis and its spice.
